customer_vision: City Power & Light operates critical infrastructure. A ransomware incident at a peer utility last year triggered a board mandate for enterprise SOC capability. NERC CIP compliance is a regulatory requirement.
business_objectives: Sentinel deployed across IT and OT/ICS environments
success_criteria: Zero undetected incidents > 15 minutes in OT environment
NERC CIP audit passed with Sentinel evidence package
risks: OT/ICS environment has air-gapped segments — Sentinel connectivity requires special architecture
NERC CIP requires evidence of 6-month monitoring history before audit
pitfalls: Previous security tool (QRadar) has complex existing rules — migration effort underestimated
Regulatory timeline is fixed — no slip allowed
key_decisions: Sentinel over QRadar — native Microsoft integration and lower TCO
Defender for IoT for OT/ICS visibility
delivery_notes: The NERC CIP audit is scheduled for January 2027 — this is immovable. OT environment connectivity requires working with their SCADA team (separate from IT). Get SCADA team alignment in Week 1.
